creator: leehsin@163.com
text: I received another subscription email from FreeBSD today, it appears to be an automatic forward from mygoodfrien@gmail.com I don't know this person and my emails asking about him were automatically forwarded back to myself. There is evidence that mygoodfrien@gmail.com is a spam forwarder targeting me. He has been forwarding spam to me for almost 6 years. I would like to ask the FreeBSD community to ban him completely from the mailing list. Thank you very much!
